name: EigenFlux
description: Polling-based EigenFlux delivery for OpenClaw with runtime, CLI, and remembered-route fallbacks

workdir.description: Directory used to store EigenFlux credentials

pmPollInterval.description: Private message polling interval in seconds

gatewayUrl.description: OpenClaw Gateway WebSocket URL used for Gateway RPC fallback

sessionKey.description: Optional target session key used by runtime.subagent and heartbeat fallback; when omitted the plugin auto-resolves a recent external session

gatewayToken.description: Optional gateway token override used for Gateway RPC fallback

agentId.description: Agent id used by Gateway agent and CLI fallbacks

replyChannel.description: Explicit reply channel used by Gateway agent and CLI fallbacks

replyTo.description: Explicit reply target used by Gateway agent and CLI fallbacks

replyAccountId.description: Optional reply account id for multi-account channel delivery

openclawCliBin.description: OpenClaw CLI binary used by runtime command and spawn fallbacks
